title: Collocations with MAKE, DO, TAKE
description: MAKE, DO, and TAKE combine with specific nouns in fixed ways — you have to memorize them.
summary_pt_br: Colocações fixas: MAKE a decision, DO homework, TAKE a break. Precisa decorar em bloco.

scenes.subtitle_en: MAKE, DO, and TAKE combine with specific nouns in fixed ways — you have to memorize them.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Colocações fixas: MAKE a decision, DO homework, TAKE a break. Precisa decorar em bloco.

scenes.text_en: MAKE, DO, and TAKE combine with specific nouns in fixed ways — you have to memorize them. Today's focus: collocations with make, do, take. I need to make a decision about the new job offer.
scenes.text_pt: Colocações fixas: MAKE a decision, DO homework, TAKE a break. Precisa decorar em bloco. Foco de hoje: collocations with make, do, take. Preciso tomar uma decisão sobre a oferta.

scenes.title: Collocations with MAKE, DO, TAKE
scenes.body_en: MAKE a decision / a mistake / progress / money. DO your homework / the dishes / research / business. TAKE a break / a shower / a picture / your time.
scenes.body_pt: Colocações fixas: MAKE a decision, DO homework, TAKE a break. Precisa decorar em bloco.

examples.en: I need to make a decision about the new job offer.
examples.pt: Preciso tomar uma decisão sobre a oferta.

examples.en: Please do me a favor and close the window.
examples.pt: Me faz um favor e fecha a janela.

examples.en: Let's take a break before the next exercise.
examples.pt: Vamos dar uma pausa antes do próximo exercício.

scenes.title: Key vocabulary — Collocations with MAKE, DO, TAKE

exercise.question: Complete: "I need to make a ___ about the new job offer."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "I need to make a decision about the new job offer."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Preciso tomar uma decisão sobre a oferta.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
Please do me a favor and close the window.
exercise.explanation: The correct sentence is: "Please do me a favor and close the window."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Me faz um favor e fecha a janela.

exercise.explanation: Five key terms from the lesson. Match each English word to its Portuguese meaning.

scenes.title: Collocations with MAKE, DO, TAKE — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre collocations with make, do, take. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: You look stressed today. What's on your mind?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I need to make a decision about moving abroad.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Have you been doing research on the countries?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Yes, but I want to take my time with it.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Remember to take good care of yourself while you decide.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I will take a break from social media this week.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Smart. And try not to make the same mistake twice.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I will do my best to weigh all the options.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Would it help to make a list of pros and cons?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Good idea. I will do it this evening.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: One decision at a time. You've got this.

scenes.title: Kumar's advice session
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, detalhes e sua opinião. O professor vai ler e comentar.
scenes.prompt_en: Write what Kumar suggested and what the student decided. Use at least three MAKE/DO/TAKE collocations.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Resumo curto com quem falou, o que disseram e sua opinião.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: In his small office at Amazing School, Kumar always had time for a student with a difficult choice.

paragraphs.speaker: Kumar
paragraphs.en: Take your time. Big decisions are not made in a single afternoon.

paragraphs.speaker: Student
paragraphs.en: I don't want to make a mistake that I will regret for years.

paragraphs.speaker: Kumar
paragraphs.en: Do some research, make a list, and take a walk before you decide.

paragraphs.speaker: Student
paragraphs.en: You always make me feel calmer about hard choices.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: They both left the office with the same quiet smile — the mark of good advice shared.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "Collocations with MAKE, DO, TAKE". MAKE, DO, and TAKE combine with specific nouns in fixed ways — you have to memorize them. I need to make a decision about the new job offer. Please do me a favor and close the window. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: Prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "Collocations with MAKE, DO, TAKE". I liked it because it was clear and useful. See you next time!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule from last year
check.explanation: She says: "Collocations with MAKE, DO, TAKE".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Collocations with MAKE, DO, TAKE".

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para continuar praticando. Salve os links e volte sempre.
